agent_assessment.rationale: The text asks for the length of XT, and the diagram clearly provides the needed geometry: SR and ST are marked congruent, RT is labeled 14, and SX is perpendicular to RT at X, indicating the altitude from the apex of an isosceles triangle. This makes X the midpoint of RT, so XT is understandable as 7.
